infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: FAYAGE needs microphone access for voice calls with drivers and clients.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: FAYAGE needs your location to show nearby drivers and track deliveries in real time.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: FAYAGE needs your location to track deliveries even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FAYAGE needs access to your photo library to upload your profile picture and required documents.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FAYAGE needs camera access to capture delivery proof photos and document images.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: FAYAGE needs your location to show nearby drivers and track deliveries in real time.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: FAYAGE needs your location to track deliveries even when the app is in the background.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: FAYAGE needs your location to show nearby drivers and track deliveries in real time.

plugins.photosPermission: FAYAGE needs access to your photo library to upload your profile picture and required documents.
plugins.cameraPermission: FAYAGE needs camera access to capture delivery proof photos and document images.
